title: Mumba Devi Temple
tagline: Mumba Devi Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mumba Devi Temple is a Hindu temple in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, dedicated to the goddess Mumbā, the local incarnation of the Parvati (Mother goddess).
overview.description: Mumba Devi Temple is a Hindu temple in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, dedicated to the goddess Mumbā, the local incarnation of the Parvati (Mother goddess). Mumba Devi is the goddess of the city of Mumbai. The name Mumbai is derived from Mumba Devi. The creek and fort are now deteriorated to a point at which they are but derelict reminders of the city's past.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Bhuleshwar
topPlaces.description: Bhuleshwar (Old spelling Bholeśvar) is a neighbourhood in Mumbai. It is situated in South Mumbai and to the north of the Fort area.

topPlaces.name: Zaveri Bazaar
topPlaces.description: Zaveri Bazaar is a jewellery market and a major hub for B2B and B2C jewellery industry in Mumbai, India. Located at Bhuleshwar in South Mumbai, just north of Crawford Market, Zaveri Bazaar is a muddle of narrow lanes, dotted with hundreds of jewellery shops that sell gems and jewels, notably Tribhovandas Bhimji Zaveri (TBZ), Dwarkadas Chandumal, Dhirajlal Bhimji Zaveri & UTZ. 65% of all gold trading and dealing in India is estimated to originate from the market.

topPlaces.name: Jama Mosque, Mumbai
topPlaces.description: The Jama Masjid (Marathi: जामा मशीद) is a Sunni Mosque, located in the Kalbadevi, near Crawford Market South Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. The mosque was completed in stages during the 19th century, in the Indo-Islamic architecture.

topPlaces.name: Mandvi, Mumbai
topPlaces.description: Mandvi is an area in South Mumbai near Masjid Bunder. It is located near Pydhone.

topPlaces.name: Dava Bazaar
topPlaces.description: Dava Bazaar (also spelled Dawa Bazaar and Dava Bazar) is an area in South Mumbai famous for medical and scientific instruments, and lab chemicals. It is located near Lohar Chawl, Crawford Market and opens into Princess Street.

topPlaces.name: Cavel
topPlaces.description: Cavel is a neighbourhood in South Mumbai. It is located to the northeast of Dhobitalao near the Chira Bazaar area.

topPlaces.name: Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Mumbai
topPlaces.description: Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Mumbai (Marathi: श्री स्वामीनारायण मंदिर, मुंबई) is a Hindu temple (Mandir) and a part of the Swaminarayan Sampraday. This Swaminarayan Temple is located in the Bhuleshwar area of Mumbai and is the oldest Swaminarayan Mandir in Mumbai, being over a hundred years old.

topPlaces.name: Chira Bazaar
topPlaces.description: Chira Bazaar is a neighborhood in Mumbai. It is famous for its jewellery and Marathi community.

items.note: Bhuleshwar (Old spelling Bholeśvar) is a neighbourhood in Mumbai. It is situated in South Mumbai and to the north of the Fort area.

Zaveri Bazaar is a jewellery market and a major hub for B2B and B2C jewellery industry in Mumbai, India. Located at Bhuleshwar in South Mumbai, just north of Crawford Market, Zaveri Bazaar is a muddle of narrow lanes, dotted with hundreds of jewellery shops that sell gems and jewels, notably Tribhovandas Bhimji Zaveri (TBZ), Dwarkadas Chandumal, Dhirajlal Bhimji Zaveri & UTZ. 65% of all gold trading and dealing in India is estimated to originate from the market.

The Jama Masjid (Marathi: जामा मशीद) is a Sunni Mosque, located in the Kalbadevi, near Crawford Market South Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. The mosque was completed in stages during the 19th century, in the Indo-Islamic architecture.
Mandvi is an area in South Mumbai near Masjid Bunder. It is located near Pydhone.

Dava Bazaar (also spelled Dawa Bazaar and Dava Bazar) is an area in South Mumbai famous for medical and scientific instruments, and lab chemicals. It is located near Lohar Chawl, Crawford Market and opens into Princess Street.
Cavel is a neighbourhood in South Mumbai. It is located to the northeast of Dhobitalao near the Chira Bazaar area.

items.note: Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Mumbai (Marathi: श्री स्वामीनारायण मंदिर, मुंबई) is a Hindu temple (Mandir) and a part of the Swaminarayan Sampraday. This Swaminarayan Temple is located in the Bhuleshwar area of Mumbai and is the oldest Swaminarayan Mandir in Mumbai, being over a hundred years old.
Chira Bazaar is a neighborhood in Mumbai. It is famous for its jewellery and Marathi community.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mumba Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mumba Devi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mumba Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (1 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mumba Devi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mumba Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mumba Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mumba Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mumba Devi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhuleshwar, Zaveri Bazaar, Jama Mosque, Mumbai, Mandvi, Mumbai, Dava Bazaar.
